name: Level Thumbnails
description: Adds level thumbnails to list cells and level info with modern caching and network controls.

level-cell-thumbnails.name: Show List Thumbnails
level-cell-thumbnails.description: Display thumbnails directly in level cells.

thumbnailButton.name: Enable Thumbnail Button
thumbnailButton.description: Adds a button in <cy>Level Info</c> to open the full thumbnail popup.

show-download-progress.name: Show Download Progress Text
show-download-progress.description: Shows percentage text while thumbnails are downloading in level lists.

lists-limit-enabled.name: Limit Thumbnails In Lists
lists-limit-enabled.description: Only show thumbnails for the first N levels in each list to reduce lag.

level-lists-limit.name: List Thumbnail Limit
level-lists-limit.description: Maximum list position that can show a thumbnail.

thumbnail-skew-angle.name: Thumbnail Skew Angle
thumbnail-skew-angle.description: Adjust the diagonal cut angle used in level cells.

thumbnail-opacity.name: Thumbnail Opacity
thumbnail-opacity.description: Opacity of thumbnails shown in level cells.

separator-opacity.name: Separator Opacity
separator-opacity.description: Opacity of the dark separator wedge in level cells.

level-bg.name: Use Thumbnail As LevelInfo Background
level-bg.description: Display the level thumbnail behind the Level Info menu when available.

level-bg-quality.name: LevelInfo Background Quality
level-bg-quality.description: High prefers full quality. Low uses a smaller image when available.

level-bg-scale-mode.name: LevelInfo Background Scale
level-bg-scale-mode.description: Cover fills the whole screen. Contain keeps the full image visible.

enable-blur.name: LevelInfo Background Blur
enable-blur.description: Currently not implemented by this port and will auto-disable when used.

file-cache-limit.name: Disk Cache Limit
file-cache-limit.description: Maximum thumbnails cached on disk. Set to -1 for unlimited, 0 to disable disk cache.

file-cache-ttl-hours.name: Disk Cache TTL (Hours)
file-cache-ttl-hours.description: How long disk-cached thumbnails stay valid before expiring.

request-retries.name: Request Retries
request-retries.description: Number of automatic retries when a download fails (404 is not retried).

retry-backoff-ms.name: Retry Backoff (ms)
retry-backoff-ms.description: Base delay between retries. Each retry increases the delay.

max-concurrent-downloads.name: Max Concurrent Downloads
max-concurrent-downloads.description: Caps simultaneous thumbnail downloads to keep scrolling smooth.

legacy-url.name: Use Legacy PNG API
legacy-url.description: Enable this if your endpoint serves old PNG files instead of modern responses.

clear-memory-cache-now.name: Clear Memory Cache Now
clear-memory-cache-now.description: Enable once to clear all in-memory thumbnails. Automatically turns off.

clear-disk-cache-now.name: Clear Disk Cache Now
clear-disk-cache-now.description: Enable once to delete cached thumbnail files. Automatically turns off.

enable-thumbnail-taking.name: In-Game Thumbnail Taking
enable-thumbnail-taking.description: <cr>Heavily work in progress.</c> May have visual issues.
